javadoc_before:
/** * Does this time interval overlap the specified time interval. *

* The intervals overlap if at least some of the time interval is in common. * Intervals are inclusive of the start instant and exclusive of the end. * * @param interval the time interval to compare to * @return true if the time intervals overlap * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the interval is null */
javadoc_after:
/** * Does this time interval overlap the specified time interval. *

* The intervals overlap if at least some of the time interval is in common. * Intervals are inclusive of the start instant and exclusive of the end. * * @param interval the time interval to compare to, null means now * @return true if the time intervals overlap */
